_meta.source: State personal property / motor vehicle tax statutes. Rates are state-weighted averages where county-level variation exists. Default vehicle value $80,000 (two cars).
_meta.schema: rate is effective annual ad-valorem tax on motor vehicle market value, decimal

VA.notes: Personal property tax rate weighted across counties; Arlington 5.0%, Fairfax 4.57%, etc.

CT.notes: Town-level motor vehicle property tax; statewide average.

ME.notes: Excise tax declines with vehicle age; first-year rate.

RI.notes: Has been phased down; historically applied.

AL.notes: Effective rate on market value; assessed at 15% × millage.

SC.notes: Assessed at 6% × millage; effective rate approx.
